title: PCA Event
description: Canonical event envelope for all PCA system events. Every workflow, agent, or tool that emits a durable action should produce an event conforming to this schema.

event_id.description: Unique event identifier. Recommended format: evt_<sha256-prefix-16>

event_class.description: Top-level taxonomy class — one of seven canonical classes.

event_type.description: Specific event type within the class. Format: <class>.<subtype>

source.description: Originating component ID — workflow name, agent ID, or script name.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the event was emitted.

session_id.description: Claude Code or agent session ID. Used for session-level traceability. Optional.

correlation_id.description: Links related events in a processing chain (e.g. capture → classify → store share the same correlation_id). Optional.

actor.description: The component that generated this event.

type.description: Actor role — see AGENTS.md for role definitions.

id.description: Workflow ID, agent name, or human identifier.

model.description: LLM model used during this event, if any.

knowledge_lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state of the knowledge object at the time of this event. Follows the canonical state machine: raw → validated → reconciled → stale → archived.

classification.description: Data sensitivity at time of event. Drives routing decisions — restricted blocks all cloud calls.

routing.description: Routing decisions made for this event — which model tier, whether approval was required.

model_tier.description: Highest cost tier used. local = Ollama only.

approval_required.description: Whether a human approval gate was triggered.

approval_gate.description: Name of the approval gate triggered, if any.

approved.description: Outcome of the approval gate. Absent if approval_required is false.

payload.description: Event-specific data. Shape varies by event_class and event_type. Must contain at least one property. See pca-event-backbone.md for per-class payload contracts.

outcome.description: Result of processing — populated after the event is handled.

error.description: Error message if status is failure or partial.

tokens_in.description: Input tokens consumed by any model call.

tokens_out.description: Output tokens produced by any model call.

artifacts.description: IDs or paths of durable artifacts produced (notes, embeddings, graph nodes).

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and retrieval.

payload.transcription: Note to self: review the event schema before sprint review.

payload.contradiction_reason: Conflicting claim about Vault unseal procedure.
